chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1997 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.7903/2026 3. For hearing of main case 20.4.2026 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bhullo advocate for the petitioners Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Asad Ahmed Aurangzeb, Advocate for respondent No. 2 and 3 Mr. Fateh Iftakhar Ali advocate for respondents No.2 and 3 Mr. Mehmood Anwar Hussain Baloch advocate for respondent No.4 --------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition in terms that its purpose has been served. Other learned counsel have no objection. Petition is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed / pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
